title: Eyeless Jack (Horror)
description: A maniacal nocturnal predator that stealthily approaches players. Its presence is unsettling and deadly.
body:
_This horror-themed Minecraft mod introduces a single, terrifying entity: **Eyeless Jack**, inspired by the infamous creepypasta character._
**Key Features:**
    _Added Entity: Eyeless Jack is the only mob included in the mod. He lurks in the shadows, especially at night, silently stalking players before launching deadly attacks._
    
**Horror Atmosphere:** 
    _Designed to create tension and fear, the mod transforms the Minecraft experience into a minimalist survival horror scenario._

**Simple & Focused:** 
 _No extra items, weapons, or other monsters just you and Eyeless Jack. His unpredictable behavior makes every encounter chilling._ 
 
**⚙️Compatibility:**
 _Works with Minecraft Forge
  May require GeckoLib for animations and enhanced entity behavior_
